query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM product_master; SELECT COUNT(*) as with_image FROM product_master WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageStatus != 'none'; SELECT COUNT(*) as without_image FROM product_master WHERE imageUrl IS NULL OR imageStatus = 'none' OR imageStatus = 'rejected';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM product_master; SELECT COUNT(*) as with_image FROM product_master WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageStatus != 'none'; SELECT COUNT(*) as without_image FROM product_master WHERE imageUrl IS NULL OR imageStatus = 'none' OR imageStatus = 'rejected';
